Jersey Club Radio | 24/7 Live Jersey Club Music Stream

Jersey Club Radio is a free 24/7 online radio station streaming Jersey Club music from the best DJs and producers. Listen live at JerseyClubRadio.com.

About Jersey Club Radio

Jersey Club Radio streams non-stop Jersey Club music — an energetic dance genre originating from New Jersey, characterized by fast-paced beats at 130–140 BPM, chopped vocal samples, heavy kick drum patterns, and creative remixes of popular hip-hop and R&B tracks.

What is Jersey Club Music?

Jersey Club is a bass-heavy, high-energy dance music genre born in Newark, New Jersey. The genre blends elements of Baltimore Club, house music, and hip-hop, featuring rapid-fire rhythms and call-and-response vocal chops that make it a favorite in clubs and on social media worldwide.

Listen Live

Tune in 24/7 — no account or subscription needed. Jersey Club Radio is completely free and streams the hottest tracks from top Jersey Club DJs and producers around the clock.
